title: T-065 — Formulation pure-function compute (cost/nutrition/allergen) + compareVersions Server Action (NPD-g)
prompt:
# T-065 — Formulation compute + compare

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.1 (recomputeCalc paragraph)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Pure-function recompute helpers (cost, nutrition weighted-sum, allergen union) executed on saveDraft + cached in formulation_calc_cache. compareVersions Server Action diffing 2 versions side-by-side up to 50 rows.

## Implementation contract
1. packages/domain/src/formulation/recompute-calc.ts: pure function recomputeCalc(ingredients, batchKg, targetPrice, yieldPct) → { totalPct, rawCost, costPerKg, marginPct, nutrition: per-100g, allergens: TEXT[] } — deterministic, no I/O, ≤50 ms p95 per design prototype recipe.jsx:3-23 useLiveCalc.
2. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_actions/recompute.ts: Server Action invoking recomputeCalc + writing formulation_calc_cache row.
3. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_actions/compare-versions.ts: returns side-by-side diff up to 50 ingredient rows × 2 versions; flags ADDED/REMOVED/CHANGED per row.
4. Vitest covers compute determinism + p95 latency + diff rows.

## Files
- packages/domain/src/formulation/recompute-calc.ts [create]
- packages/domain/src/formulation/__tests__/recompute-calc.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_actions/recompute.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_actions/compare-versions.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/formulation/_actions/__tests__/compute.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a fixed seed of 10 ingredients with known pcts and costs, when recomputeCalc runs 1000 times, then totalPct, rawCost, marginPct values are byte-identical (deterministic) per §17.11.1 pure-function contract
2. Given recomputeCalc runs against 50 ingredients, when measured over 100 calls, then p95 latency is ≤ 50 ms per §17.11.1 perf budget
3. Given compareVersions is called against version 1 (5 ingredients) and version 2 (6 ingredients), when result is returned, then it contains 5 unchanged + 1 ADDED row with correct delta per §17.11.1 compare contract

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/recompute-calc.test.ts (determinism + p95) + __tests__/compute.test.ts (compare diff) before functions exist
- Run 'pnpm --filter domain test recompute-calc && pnpm --filter web test compute'

## Risk red lines
- Do not perform I/O inside recomputeCalc (must remain pure)
- Do not exceed 50 ms p95
- Do not allow non-deterministic floating ordering
